title: premna odorata var. detergibilis
intro: Premna odorata var. detergibilis, also known as Indian bay leaf or elephant tea, is a variant of the Premna odorata plant, which is a species of flowering plant in the mint family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, which are used to treat various health conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Premna odorata var. detergibilis include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and improving digestion, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. The plant can be prepared in various forms, including teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are often used to treat a range of health issues.
